mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = self.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = nil
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  self.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data.to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

mutation_result.mutation_source:
def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data.fetch("from").to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join("")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = nil
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = self.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=nil
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type=nil
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if nil
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    unless html_body
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

def build_raw_email(data)
  mail = Mail.new
  mail.from=data["from"].to_s
  mail.to=Array(data["to"]).join(", ")
  mail.subject=data["subject"].to_s
  html_body = data["html"]
  text_body = data["text"]
  if html_body && text_body
    text_part = Mail::Part.new
    text_part.body=text_body
    mail.text_part=text_part
    html_part = Mail::Part.new
    html_part.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
    html_part.body=html_body
    mail.html_part=html_part
  else
    if html_body
      mail.content_type="text/html; charset=UTF-8"
      mail.body=html_body
    else
      mail.body=text_body.to_s
    end
  end
  mail.to_s
end

  ::Resend::Webhooks.verify(payload: request.raw_post, headers: { svix_id: request.headers["svix-id"], svix_timestamp: request.headers["svix-timestamp"], svix_signature: request.headers["svix-signature"] }, webhook_secret: Rails.application.credentials.resend_webhook_secret)
rescue StandardError => e
  Rails.logger.warn("Resend webhook verification failed: #{e.message}")
  head(nil)
end
